import{o as e}from"./chunk-C65VWZLV-1bJzG5ow.js";import{m as t,n}from"./enums-DlqUfPnS.js";const r=(e,t,n=[`true`,`1`])=>{let r=t;r||=typeof location>`u`?void 0:new URL(location.href,`https://www.shopify.com`);let i=r?.searchParams.get(e)||``;return!!n.find(e=>i===e)},i=t(`SITE_FAVICON`),a=`https://${t(`SITE_URL`)}`,o=`/__dux`,s=`/__pb/mm`;var c=function(e){return e.DebugEnableGTG=`debug_enable_gtg`,e.DebugDisableAnalytics=`debug_disable_analytics`,e.DebugShopifyMerchant=`debug_shopify_merchant`,e}(c||{});const l={DEBUG_ENABLE_GTG:r(c.DebugEnableGTG),DEBUG_DISABLE_ANALYTICS:r(c.DebugDisableAnalytics),DEBUG_SHOPIFY_MERCHANT:r(c.DebugShopifyMerchant)},u=`#privacy`,d=`manage-privacy`,f=t(`APP_ENV`)!==`production`,p=`start-free-trial`,m=`GTM-TZ26LP8`,h={[n.PrivacySignal]:e.Essential,[n.ShopifyEssentialLegacy]:e.Essential,[n.LoggedIn]:e.Essential,[n.IdentitySession]:e.Essential,[n.MerchantEssential]:e.Functional,[n.IsShopifyMerchant]:e.Functional,[n.SessionToken]:e.Analytics,[n.MultiTrackToken]:e.Analytics,[n.Assignments]:e.Analytics,[n.GoogleAnalyticsId]:e.Analytics,[n.MerchantMarketing]:e.Marketing,[n.GoogleAdSense]:e.Marketing,[n.FacebookPixel]:e.Marketing,[n.MicrosoftClick]:e.Marketing,[n.TikTokClick]:e.Marketing,[n.TwitterClick]:e.Marketing,[n.RedditClick]:e.Marketing,[n.LinkedInClick]:e.Marketing,"mto_%":e.Marketing,"_ga_%":e.Analytics};export{m as a,u as c,a as d,l as i,f as l,i as n,s as o,o as r,d as s,h as t,p as u};
